title: NOEMA3D: Resolving radial gas flows in disk galaxies at z~1.1-1.6 with high-resolution CO observations
comment: Submitted to A&A, see also companion paper: Chen et al. 2026
summary: We present NOEMA3D, a unique high-resolution study of purely molecular gas kinematics at $z \sim 1.1$ to 1.6, providing a dedicated view of cold gas dynamics at the late stages of the peak epoch of cosmic star formation. Using deep ($gtrsim 20$ hr on source per target) IRAM-NOEMA CO observations of 10 massive ($10.45 < log(M^*/M_\odot) < 11.43$) ) main-sequence galaxies, complemented by high-resolution JWST imaging, we resolve the molecular gas kinematics and morphology on kiloparsec scales. We find that all galaxies exhibit ordered rotation with moderate intrinsic turbulence (median $σ_0 \sim 32 \pm 10$ km/s, median $V_c/σ_0 \sim 8.6 \pm 2.9$), consistent with dynamically turbulent disks at late cosmic noon. After modeling the axisymmetric rotation with the forward-modeling code DysmalPy, we reveal spatially coherent velocity residuals in all but one more inclined system. The inferred in-plane non circular motions reach amplitudes of $\sim 50$-100 km/s, significantly larger than typically observed in local disk galaxies. Interpreting these non-circular motions as radial flows we find that the velocity residuals spatially coincide with non-axisymmetric structures -- spiral arms and bars -- demonstrating a direct link between galaxy morphology and gas transport at $z \sim 1$-2. In spiral galaxies, the residual velocity patterns are typically dominated by inflows, while barred systems display an apparent inflow-outflow pattern, characteristic of in-plane bar-driven gas motions. We further find that the inferred molecular gas inflow rates are substantial, with a typical net inflow rate of the order of the star formation rate ( $\dot M \sim -50 M_\odot/$yr). This implies that spiral arms and bars at cosmic noon are highly efficient at funneling cold gas toward galaxy centers, perhaps driving the buildup of bulges and feeding central star forming regions and supermassive black holes.

AI.tldr: NOEMA3D研究使用NOEMA望远镜和JWST观测了10个z~1.1-1.6的大质量星系，发现它们都有有序旋转但存在显著的非圆周运动，这些运动与螺旋臂和棒状结构相关，表明在宇宙正午时期这些结构能高效地将冷气体输送到星系中心。
AI.motivation: 研究宇宙正午时期（z~1-2）星系中冷气体动力学的特性，特别是在星系形态（螺旋臂和棒状结构）如何影响气体输运和星系演化方面，这是理解星系形成和演化的关键时期。
AI.method: 使用IRAM-NOEMA望远镜对10个大质量主序星系进行深度CO观测（每个目标>20小时），结合JWST高分辨率成像，解析千秒差距尺度的分子气体运动学和形态。使用DysmalPy代码对轴对称旋转进行前向建模。
AI.result: 所有星系都表现出有序旋转但存在显著的非圆周运动（50-100 km/s），这些速度残差与非轴对称结构（螺旋臂和棒状结构）空间重合。螺旋星系中速度残差主要表现为流入，而棒状星系显示流入-流出模式。推断的分子气体流入率与恒星形成率相当（~50 M⊙/yr）。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙正午时期的螺旋臂和棒状结构能高效地将冷气体输送到星系中心，这可能驱动星系核球形成、喂养中心恒星形成区和超大质量黑洞，对星系演化有重要影响。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了NOEMA3D，这是一项在$z \sim 1.1$至1.6处对纯分子气体运动学进行的高分辨率独特研究，提供了宇宙恒星形成峰值时期晚期冷气体动力学的专门视角。利用对10个大质量（$10.45 < \log(M^*/M_\odot) < 11.43$）主序星系的深度（每个目标源$\gtrsim 20$小时）IRAM-NOEMA CO观测，辅以高分辨率JWST成像，我们在千秒差距尺度上解析了分子气体的运动学和形态。我们发现所有星系都表现出有序的旋转，具有适中的本征湍流（中值$\sigma_0 \sim 32 \pm 10$ km/s，中值$V_c/\sigma_0 \sim 8.6 \pm 2.9$），这与宇宙正午晚期动力学湍动盘一致。在使用前向建模代码DysmalPy对轴对称旋转进行建模后，我们揭示了除一个倾斜度较大的系统外，所有星系中都存在空间连贯的速度残差。推断的盘面内非圆周运动幅度达到$\sim 50$-100 km/s，显著大于通常在本地盘状星系中观测到的值。将这些非圆周运动解释为径向流，我们发现速度残差在空间上与轴对称结构——旋臂和棒——重合，这证明了在$z \sim 1$-2处星系形态与气体输运之间的直接联系。在旋涡星系中，残差速度模式通常以流入为主，而棒旋星系则显示出明显的流入-流出模式，这是盘面内棒驱动气体运动的特征。我们进一步发现，推断的分子气体流入速率相当可观，典型的净流入速率与恒星形成速率相当（$\dot M \sim -50 M_\odot/$yr）。这意味着宇宙正午时期的旋臂和棒在将冷气体输送到星系中心方面非常高效，可能驱动了核球形成，并为中心恒星形成区和超大质量黑洞提供燃料。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，宇宙正午时期的螺旋臂和棒状结构能高效地将冷气体输送到星系中心，这可能驱动星系核球形成、喂养中心恒星形成区和超大质量黑洞，对星系演化有重要影响。

title: BEACON: JWST NIRCam Pure-parallel Imaging Survey. III. Constraints on the UV LF and the Clustering of z~7-14 Galaxies
comment: 32 pages, 11 figures, to be submitted to ApJ
summary: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) has extended the frontier of galaxy detection to redshifts z>11, finding a high abundance of UV-bright sources that challenge theoretical models. However, most current results come from just a few fields, introducing uncertainties due to cosmic variance. Here, we constrain z~7-14 UV luminosity functions (LFs) over ~400 arcmin^2 across 36 independent sightlines from DR2 of BEACON, a JWST pure-parallel NIRCam multi-band imaging survey. We identify 164 7<z<12 galaxy candidates: 150 F090W-, 14 F115W-, and no robust F150W-dropouts. Based on 11 pointings overlapping with public JWST spectroscopy, we observe 100% purity. Our z~7.5 UV LF agrees with previous bright-end measurements but yields lower number densities at $-21\leq M_\mathrm{UV}\leq-19$. At z~10, our measurements are lower than most photometric JWST results but match spectroscopic constraints, consistent with the high purity of our selection. The LFs at z~7.5 and z~10 are consistent with pre-JWST models, while our limits at z>13 do not rule out a possible excess. We measure significant clustering of bright ($M_\mathrm{UV}<-20.5$) galaxies at 7<z<10. Fields hosting such sources are approximately three times more likely to be overdense relative to the full survey, implying that UV-bright galaxies preferentially reside in the most massive halos at these redshifts. Comparing with semi-numerical simulations, we estimate that $M_{\mathrm{UV}} < -20.5$ galaxies inhabit halos ~0.9 dex less massive at z~11 than at z~7, consistent with a shift to higher star formation rates. However, their observed clustering exceeds predictions from pre-JWST luminosity-halo mass relations, suggesting these sources reside in more massive halos than previously modelled and/or multiple halo occupation.

AI.tldr: JWST BEACON巡天在36个独立视场中发现了164个7<z<12星系候选体，测量了z~7-14的紫外光度函数，发现亮星系显著成团分布，表明它们优先位于这些红移处最巨大的暗物质晕中。
AI.motivation: JWST已探测到红移z>11的星系，但现有结果主要来自少数几个天区，存在宇宙方差带来的不确定性。需要利用更广泛的巡天数据来约束早期宇宙的星系形成模型。
AI.method: 利用JWST BEACON巡天DR2的36个独立视场（约400平方角分）的NIRCam多波段成像数据，通过F090W、F115W、F150W dropout方法筛选7<z<12星系候选体，并基于与公共光谱数据的重叠区域验证纯度。
AI.result: 识别出164个7<z<12星系候选体，纯度达100%。z~7.5紫外光度函数与先前亮端测量一致，但在-21≤M_UV≤-19范围内数密度较低。z~10测量低于多数JWST光度测量结果但与光谱约束一致。亮星系（M_UV<-20.5）在7<z<10显著成团，这些星系所在的区域相对于整个巡天过密度概率约为3倍。
AI.conclusion: 紫外亮星系优先位于这些红移处最巨大的暗物质晕中。M_UV<-20.5星系在z~11的晕质量比z~7低约0.9 dex，与恒星形成率增加一致。观测到的成团性超过先前模型预测，表明这些星系位于比先前建模更巨大的晕中，和/或存在多重晕占据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）已将星系探测的红移前沿扩展至z>11，发现了大量紫外亮源，这对理论模型提出了挑战。然而，目前大多数结果仅来自少数天区，引入了宇宙方差带来的不确定性。在此，我们利用BEACON（一项JWST纯平行NIRCam多波段成像巡天）的DR2数据，在跨越36条独立视线、约400平方角分的天区内，约束了z~7-14的紫外光度函数（LFs）。我们识别出164个7<z<12的星系候选体：150个F090W dropout、14个F115W dropout，以及0个可靠的F150W dropout。基于与公开JWST光谱重叠的11个指向，我们观测到100%的纯度。我们的z~7.5紫外LF与先前的亮端测量结果一致，但在$-21\leq M_\mathrm{UV}\leq-19$范围内给出了更低的数密度。在z~10处，我们的测量值低于大多数JWST测光结果，但与光谱约束相符，这与我们选择的高纯度一致。z~7.5和z~10处的LF与JWST之前的模型一致，而我们在z>13处的上限并不排除可能存在过剩。我们测量了7<z<10处亮星系（$M_\mathrm{UV}<-20.5$）的显著成团性。与整个巡天相比，拥有此类源的场出现超密的概率大约高出三倍，这意味着紫外亮星系优先存在于这些红移处最巨大的暗物质晕中。与半数值模拟比较，我们估计$M_{\mathrm{UV}} < -20.5$的星系在z~11处所栖息的暗晕质量比z~7处低约0.9 dex，这与恒星形成率增加一致。然而，它们观测到的成团性超过了JWST之前的光度-暗晕质量关系预测，表明这些源存在于比先前建模更巨大的暗晕中，和/或存在多重暗晕占据。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：紫外亮星系优先位于这些红移处最巨大的暗物质晕中。M_UV<-20.5星系在z~11的晕质量比z~7低约0.9 dex，与恒星形成率增加一致。观测到的成团性超过先前模型预测，表明这些星系位于比先前建模更巨大的晕中，和/或存在多重晕占据。

title: Dense Ionized Outflow with Five Narrow Components in a Dust-obscured Galaxy
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables, accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: We present our discovery of a complex ionized outflow in SDSS J101034.28+372514.7 (J1010+3725), a dust-obscured galaxy (DOG) at $z=0.282$. The SDSS optical spectrum of J1010+3725 shows five narrow components with one broad component in [O{\,\sc iii}]$λ$5007, which represents one of the most complex outflow structures observed among dusty active galactic nuclei. Spectrum fitting shows that the five narrow components have a wide range of velocity shifts (from $-1475$ to $+507$ km s$^{-1}$). The possible multiple peaks are also observed in [O{\,\sc iii}]$λ$4363 and [Ne{\,\sc iii}]$λ$3868, which allows us to investigate the physical condition of the outflowing gas by comparing the measured emission-line flux ratios with photoionization models. The comparison suggests that the five outflowing components are characterized by high hydrogen densities ($\gtrsim 10^5$ cm$^{-3}$). Our results imply that the five highly dense gas components may be outflowing with multiple bulk velocities at the innermost part of the narrow-line region in J1010+3725.

AI.tldr: 在红移0.282的尘埃遮蔽星系J1010+3725中发现了复杂的电离外流结构，[O III]λ5007谱线显示五个窄成分和一个宽成分，代表尘埃活动星系核中最复杂的外流结构之一
AI.motivation: 研究尘埃遮蔽星系中的电离外流结构，特别是复杂多成分外流系统的物理特性，以增进对活动星系核反馈机制的理解
AI.method: 使用SDSS光谱数据，对[O III]λ5007谱线进行多成分拟合，分析五个窄成分的谱线特征，同时观测[O III]λ4363和[Ne III]λ3868谱线的多峰结构，通过测量发射线通量比并与光致电离模型比较来研究外流气体的物理条件
AI.result: 五个窄成分显示广泛的视向速度偏移（-1475到+507 km/s），外流气体具有高氢密度（≥10⁵ cm⁻³），表明在窄线区最内层存在多个以不同体速度外流的高密度气体成分
AI.conclusion: J1010+3725星系中存在复杂的多成分高密度电离外流系统，这为理解活动星系核反馈机制和尘埃遮蔽星系中的气体动力学提供了重要线索

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在尘埃遮蔽星系（DOG）SDSS J101034.28+372514.7（J1010+3725，红移$z=0.282$）中发现的一个复杂电离外流。SDSS光学光谱显示，[O{\,\sc iii}]$λ$5007谱线具有五个窄成分和一个宽成分，这代表了尘埃活动星系核中观测到的最复杂的外流结构之一。光谱拟合表明，五个窄成分的速度偏移范围很广（从$-1475$到$+507$ km s$^{-1}$）。在[O{\,\sc iii}]$λ$4363和[Ne{\,\sc iii}]$λ$3868中也观测到了可能的多重峰值，这使我们能够通过将测量的发射线通量比与光致电离模型进行比较，来研究外流气体的物理条件。比较结果表明，五个外流成分具有高氢密度（$\gtrsim 10^5$ cm$^{-3}$）。我们的结果暗示，这五个高密度气体成分可能以多个整体速度在J1010+3725的窄线区最内部区域向外流动。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，J1010+3725星系中存在复杂的多成分高密度电离外流系统，这为理解活动星系核反馈机制和尘埃遮蔽星系中的气体动力学提供了重要线索。

title: Fourth-order galaxy-galaxy-lensing: Theoretical framework and direct estimation
summary: Traditional galaxy-galaxy lensing is a well-established method of probing the statistical properties of the Universe's matter and galaxy distribution. However, this measure does not carry all the statistical information, provided the matter and galaxy distribution contain non-Gaussian features. In order to study these non-Gaussianities, it is necessary to consider higher-order statistical measures. The aim of this work is to extend the analytical basis describing the statistical correlations between galaxies and shear to the fourth order, with special emphasis on the associated aperture statistics. In order to include fourth-order statistics in future analysis of the relation between mass and galaxies, we further investigate whether we can expect to detect these statistics from observations of stage IV surveys. We define the four-point correlation function (4PCF) between the shear and the positions of triplets of foreground galaxies and derive its relation to the respective trispectrum. We convert the 4PCF to aperture statistics and derive the analytical form of the respective filter function, which we then implement in a numerical integration pipeline. Furthermore, we develop a direct estimator that allows us to measure galaxy-mass aperture moments of arbitrary order on pixelized data using a Fast-Fourier-Transform (FFT) algorithm. We show that the corresponding aperture measure $\langle\mathcal{N}^3 M_\mathrm{ap}\rangle$ can be calculated with sub-percent accuracy on relevant aperture scales, $θ$, by means of numerical integration. Furthermore, we apply the FFT-based direct estimator to a mock catalog with a realistic stage IV survey setup on a sky area of $2000~\mathrm{deg}^2$, and detect the connected part of the aperture statistics $\langle\mathcal{N}^3 M_\mathrm{ap}\rangle(θ)$ with a signal-to-noise ratio of roughly nine on small aperture scales.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 传统的星系-星系透镜效应是探测宇宙物质和星系分布统计特性的成熟方法。然而，当物质和星系分布包含非高斯特征时，该测量无法携带所有统计信息。为了研究这些非高斯性，有必要考虑高阶统计量。本工作的目的是将描述星系与剪切之间统计相关性的分析基础扩展到四阶，特别关注相关的孔径统计量。为了将四阶统计量纳入未来质量与星系关系的分析中，我们进一步研究了是否可以从第四阶段巡天观测中检测到这些统计量。我们定义了剪切与前景区星系三重态位置之间的四点相关函数（4PCF），并推导了其与相应三谱的关系。我们将4PCF转换为孔径统计量，推导了相应滤波函数的解析形式，并将其实现到数值积分流程中。此外，我们开发了一个直接估计器，允许使用快速傅里叶变换（FFT）算法在像素化数据上测量任意阶的星系-质量孔径矩。我们表明，通过数值积分，可以在相关孔径尺度θ上以亚百分比精度计算相应的孔径测量值⟨𝒩³M_ap⟩。此外，我们将基于FFT的直接估计器应用于一个具有现实第四阶段巡天设置的模拟星表，覆盖2000 deg²的天空区域，并在小孔径尺度上以约9的信噪比检测到了孔径统计量⟨𝒩³M_ap⟩(θ)的连接部分。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：成功建立了星系-剪切四阶统计的理论框架和数值实现，证明了在第四阶段巡天观测中检测这些高阶统计量的可行性，为研究宇宙物质分布的非高斯特征提供了新工具。

title: SDSS-V LVM: Verifying what, and where, the 'Galactic Center' Lobe is
summary: The so-called 'Galactic Center' Lobe (GCL) is an extended (~1 deg) radio continuum feature situated above the Galactic Plane, for which the literature contains varying claims about both its nature and location. Using new optical integral field spectroscopic observations from the SDSS-V Local Volume Mapper, we confirm the characterization of the GCL as a foreground photoionized HII region, not associated with the Galactic center. We present a new analysis of the ionized gas morphology, line ratio diagnostics, and kinematics. From our [SIII]9532 emission line map, which suffers the least extinction, we identify ionized gas emission throughout a closed outer loop, which does not fill the GCL interior. All optical line ratio diagnostics are consistent with photoionization. By comparing the ionized gas reddening from the Balmer decrement with 3D dust maps, we directly constrain the distance to the GCL to ~2 kpc. [NII]6583 line kinematics show a uniform velocity structure across the GCL, further confirming that the entire bubble is one structure. The size and emission line morphology is strongly reminiscent of that seen in the nearby Barnard's Loop, providing a possible analog to explain how this outer shell may be photoionized by a more distant and off-center embedded young cluster. We suggest the acronym GCL be repurposed to instead abbreviate the name 'Greatly Confused Loop'.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 所谓的“银河中心”瓣（GCL）是一个位于银盘上方、延伸约1度的射电连续谱特征，文献中对其性质和位置存在不同说法。利用SDSS-V本地体积巡天的新光学积分场光谱观测，我们确认GCL是一个前景光致电离的HII区，与银河中心无关。我们提出了对电离气体形态、谱线比值诊断和运动学的新分析。根据我们受消光影响最小的[SIII]9532发射线图，我们识别出一个闭合外环内的电离气体发射，该环并未充满GCL内部。所有光学谱线比值诊断均与光致电离一致。通过将巴尔末减缩得到的电离气体红化与三维尘埃图进行比较，我们直接将GCL的距离限制在约2千秒差距。[NII]6583谱线运动学显示GCL上速度结构均匀，进一步证实整个气泡是一个结构。其大小和发射线形态与附近的巴纳德环非常相似，这提供了一个可能的类比，解释了这个外壳如何可能被一个更远且偏离中心的嵌入年轻星团光致电离。我们建议将缩写GCL重新用于表示“Greatly Confused Loop”。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，GCL并非与银河中心相关，而是前景光致电离结构，建议将其重命名为"Greatly Confused Loop"以反映其长期存在的混淆。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The Galactic Center, as seen combining optical ionized gas and radio continuum emission. 1.284 GHz radio continuum emission imaged by MeerKAT (green; Heywood et al. 2022 ) fills the plane, with narrow filaments extending vertically. LVM cannot directly probe the heavily extincted midplane, but bright line emission is apparent above and below, showing a variety of emission line ratios as traced by H \(\alpha\) (orange), [S ii ] (pink) and [S iii ] (blue). Clearly this field produces projections of many objects blended along this complicated line-of-sight. For annotation and labeling of the GCL, see Figure 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：银河中心，结合光学电离气体和射电连续谱发射所见。MeerKAT成像的1.284 GHz射电连续谱发射（绿色；Heywood et al. 2022）充满银盘，窄丝状结构垂直延伸。LVM无法直接探测严重消光的银道面，但在其上下方可见明亮的谱线发射，显示出由H \(\alpha\)（橙色）、[S ii]（粉色）和[S iii]（蓝色）追踪的各种发射线比值。显然，这个天区产生了沿这条复杂视线混合的许多天体的投影。关于GCL的标注和标记，见图2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: [S iii ] suffers least from extinction, and provides the most complete and accurate view of the morphology of ionized gas in the direction of the Galactic Center. The direct view of the GCL (right) traces out clearly the full structure of the lobe, as annotated and divided into subregions (left). The ‘Integrated’ full lobe (solid red line) has further been subdivided into components (red dashed lines) labeled GCL-1 to GCL-5, along with a single smaller region directly in the center (GCL-C). Four bright H ii regions (labeled HII-1 to HII-4) are also selected at b \( ∘ (blue lines). GCL-1 and HII-1 to HII-4 have tentative designations as H ii regions based on nebulosity in photographic plate surveys (Sharpless 1959 ; Dubout-Crillon 1976 ) . The Galactic Plane is marked with a horizontal grey dashed line.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：[S iii]受消光影响最小，提供了银河中心方向电离气体形态最完整、最准确的视图。GCL的直接视图（右）清晰地勾勒出瓣的完整结构，如左图所示进行注释并划分为子区域。‘积分’全瓣（实红线）进一步细分为组件（红虚线），标记为GCL-1至GCL-5，以及中心的一个较小区域（GCL-C）。在b \( ∘（蓝线）处还选择了四个明亮的HII区（标记为HII-1至HII-4）。GCL-1和HII-1至HII-4基于照相底片巡天中的星云状物质（Sharpless 1959；Dubout-Crillon 1976）被暂定为HII区。银道面用水平灰色虚线标记。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Line emission from the integrated spectra from each GCL subregion shown in Figure 2 . Line centers (assuming v LSR =0 km s -1 ) are marked with vertical dotted lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：来自图2所示每个GCL子区域积分光谱的谱线发射。谱线中心（假设v LSR =0 km s -1）用垂直虚线标记。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Direct multi-wavelength comparison of GCL morphology between LVM optical line emission from H \(\alpha\) and [S iii ] (top left, center), MeerKAT 1.284 GHz radio continuum (top right), mid-IR dust emission in the PAH dominated 8.0 \(\mu\) m (bottom left) and thermal dust 24 \(\mu\) m (bottom center), and 13 CO molecular gas (bottom right). The morphology of the [S iii ] and radio lobe agrees quite well at high galactic latitudes, and is encased in an outer shell of PAH emission, with warm dust still in the region interior. CO clouds are offset, outside the GCL boundary. The GCL is marked in a solid red line, and the compact and bright GCL-1 is also marked in a red dashed line.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：LVM光学谱线发射（来自H \(\alpha\)和[S iii]）（左上、中）、MeerKAT 1.284 GHz射电连续谱（右上）、PAH主导的8.0 \(\mu\) m中红外尘埃发射（左下）和热尘埃24 \(\mu\) m（中下）以及13 CO分子气体（右下）之间GCL形态的直接多波段比较。[S iii]和射电瓣的形态在高银纬处吻合良好，并被PAH发射的外壳包裹，内部区域仍有暖尘埃。CO云团偏移，位于GCL边界之外。GCL用实红线标记，紧凑明亮的GCL-1也用红虚线标记。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: BPT diagnostic diagrams compare the measured [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) with [N ii ]/H \(\alpha\) and [S ii ]/H \(\alpha\) for the Integrated GCL and each integrated subregion (red), along with b \( ii regions (blue), as labeled in Figure 2 . These are compared to a set of Galactic H ii regions observed by the DESIRED sample (Méndez-Delgado et al. 2023 ) . All regions are consistent with photoionization when compared to the Kewley et al. ( 2001 ) demarcation line, and most are also consistent with the empirical Kauffmann et al. ( 2003 ) line.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：BPT诊断图比较了积分GCL和每个积分子区域（红色）以及b \( ii区（蓝色）的测量[O iii]/H \(\beta\)与[N ii]/H \(\alpha\)和[S ii]/H \(\alpha\)，如图2所示。这些与DESIRED样本（Méndez-Delgado et al. 2023）观测的一组银河HII区进行了比较。与Kewley et al.（2001）分界线相比，所有区域均与光致电离一致，且大多数也与Kauffmann et al.（2003）经验线一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of Pa9/H \(\alpha\) / with H \(\alpha\) /H \(\beta\) to place constraints on the shape of the dust extinction law. Individual fibers with modest (S/N \(>\) 5; grey) and high (S/N \(>\) 10; red) confidence detections of Pa9, along with the integrated measurement from GCL-1, are compared with predictions from the Fitzpatrick ( 1999 ) extinction curve with a range of R V values (dotted, dashed, and solid lines). The solid line is further colored to show how the lines ratios would vary with changes in E(B-V). We find that R V =3.6 gives the best agreement, and corresponds to values of E(B-V) = 1.0-1.5.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Pa9/H \(\alpha\)与H \(\alpha\)/H \(\beta\)的比较，以限制尘埃消光律的形状。具有中等（S/N \(>\) 5；灰色）和高（S/N \(>\) 10；红色）置信度Pa9探测的单个光纤，以及来自GCL-1的积分测量，与Fitzpatrick（1999）消光曲线在R V值范围（虚线、短划线和实线）内的预测进行了比较。实线进一步着色以显示谱线比值如何随E(B-V)变化。我们发现R V =3.6给出最佳一致性，对应E(B-V) = 1.0-1.5的值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: \(T_{e}\) [N ii ] as a function of [N ii ]/[S ii ] (top) and [N ii ]/[S ii ] (bottom) for a sample of Galactic H ii regions (Méndez-Delgado et al. 2023 ) . Points are colored by their Galactocentric radius (R G ), and to guide the eye a linear fit (black) is performed for regions within the solar radius (R \({}_{G} ii regions, and consistent with a Te \(\sim\) 7000-8000 K.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：对于一组银河HII区（Méndez-Delgado et al. 2023），\(T_{e}\) [N ii]作为[N ii]/[S ii]（上）和[N ii]/[S ii]（下）的函数。点按银心半径（R G ）着色，为便于观察，对太阳半径（R \({}_{G} ii区内的点进行了线性拟合（黑色），并与Te \(\sim\) 7000-8000 K一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: A map of the ionized gas velocity based on the [N ii ] line centroid, which is masked at S/N \( ii regions (blue lines).
figures.caption_zh: 图8：基于[N ii]谱线质心的电离气体速度图，在S/N \( ii区（蓝线）处掩膜。

title: Suppressed Magnetogenesis from Ultralight Dark Matter due to Finite Conductivity
summary: Recently, a mechanism for generating astrophysically relevant magnetic fields via ultralight pseudoscalar dark matter, through the coupling term $g_{φγ} φF_{μν}\tilde{F}^{μν}$ in the Lagrangian density, was proposed in Brandenberger et al (2026) (see Ref. 1). In this scenario, the electromagnetic fields are amplified through the phenomena of parametric resonance due to the oscillatory behaviour of the pseudoscalar field. However, the analysis presented in that work does not account for the effects of a conducting medium. In this paper, we incorporate the finite conductivity of the plasma into the dynamics of the pseudoscalar and electromagnetic fields. We show that, due to the large conductivity relative to the Hubble parameter, the amplification of the electromagnetic fields due to parametric resonance is significantly suppressed. Consequently, we find that, for observationally viable values of the coupling between the electromagnetic field and the ultralight pseudoscalar field, it is not possible to generate magnetic fields of sufficient strength to explain their presence in cosmic voids.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在导电等离子体环境中，超轻赝标量暗物质通过参数共振机制产生天体物理相关磁场的可行性。研究发现，由于等离子体的大电导率，参数共振效应被显著抑制，无法产生足够强的磁场来解释宇宙空洞中的观测现象。
AI.motivation: 先前的研究（Brandenberger et al, 2026）提出了超轻赝标量暗物质通过参数共振机制产生天体物理相关磁场的机制，但该分析未考虑导电介质的影响。本研究的动机是探究在真实的等离子体环境中，这种磁场生成机制是否仍然有效。
AI.method: 将等离子体的有限电导率纳入赝标量场和电磁场的动力学方程中，分析电导率对参数共振效应的影响。通过比较电导率与哈勃参数的大小关系，研究磁场放大的抑制机制。
AI.result: 由于等离子体电导率远大于哈勃参数，参数共振导致的电磁场放大被显著抑制。在观测上可行的电磁场与超轻赝标量场耦合参数范围内，无法产生足够强度的磁场来解释宇宙空洞中的磁场存在。
AI.conclusion: 在考虑真实等离子体环境的有限电导率后，超轻赝标量暗物质通过参数共振机制产生天体物理相关磁场的方案不可行，无法解释宇宙空洞中观测到的磁场起源。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近，Brandenberger等人（2026）（见参考文献1）提出了一种通过超轻赝标量暗物质产生天体物理相关磁场的机制，该机制基于拉格朗日密度中的耦合项 $g_{φγ} φF_{μν}\tilde{F}^{μν}$。在该场景中，电磁场通过赝标量场的振荡行为引起的参数共振现象被放大。然而，该工作未考虑导电介质的影响。本文中，我们将等离子体的有限电导率纳入赝标量场和电磁场的动力学中。我们证明，由于电导率相对于哈勃参数很大，参数共振导致的电磁场放大被显著抑制。因此，我们发现，对于电磁场与超轻赝标量场之间观测上可行的耦合值，无法产生足够强度的磁场来解释宇宙空洞中磁场的存在。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：在考虑真实等离子体环境的有限电导率后，超轻赝标量暗物质通过参数共振机制产生天体物理相关磁场的方案不可行，无法解释宇宙空洞中观测到的磁场起源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The upper panel shows the time evolution of the two helicity modes of the vector potential, normalized to their initial values. The solid and dashed lines correspond to the ‘ \(-\) ’ and ‘ \(+\) ’ helicity modes, respectively. The results are shown for \(k/k_{c}=0.2\) and \(1.0\) . The lower panel displays the evolution of the energy densities of the \(\phi\) field ( \(\rho_{\phi}\) ) and the EM field ( \(\rho_{B}\) ), both normalized to \(\rho_{\phi}\) at \(z=0\) . In this figure, we have taken \(\sigma=0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上方面板展示了矢势的两个螺旋度模式的时间演化，归一化到其初始值。实线和虚线分别对应‘ \(-\) ’和‘ \(+\) ’螺旋度模式。结果针对 \(k/k_{c}=0.2\) 和 \(1.0\) 显示。下方面板展示了 \(\phi\) 场（ \(\rho_{\phi}\) ）和电磁场（ \(\rho_{B}\) ）的能量密度演化，两者均归一化到 \(z=0\) 时的 \(\rho_{\phi}\) 。在此图中，我们取 \(\sigma=0\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Same as figure 1 , but for a non-zero conductivity. In this case, we choose \(\sigma\) such that the initial ratio \(\sigma/H=10^{10}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与图1相同，但针对非零电导率。在此情况下，我们选择 \(\sigma\) 使得初始比值 \(\sigma/H=10^{10}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The magnetic field spectrum is shown at different times, \(z=0,\,4.0,\,7.9,\,11.9,\) and \(13.5\) . The vertical gray line indicates the wavenumber, \(k/(aH)=g_{\phi\gamma}M_{{pl}}\) . The top panel corresponds to \(\sigma=0\) , while the middle and lower panels is for initial values \(\sigma/H=10^{10}\) and \(5\times 10^{10}\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在不同时刻 \(z=0,\,4.0,\,7.9,\,11.9,\) 和 \(13.5\) 显示的磁场谱。垂直灰线表示波数 \(k/(aH)=g_{\phi\gamma}M_{{pl}}\) 。上方面板对应 \(\sigma=0\) ，而中间和下面板分别对应初始值 \(\sigma/H=10^{10}\) 和 \(5\times 10^{10}\) 。
